description: Composite delamination pulse-echo signature. LEFT: 8-ply CFRP cross-section (fiber-angle hatching), 0° probe + vertical beam, healthy back-wall contact. RIGHT: A-scan with FS entry signal and healthy BW echo, depth ruler 0/t/2/t. Reveals: delam lens opens between plies (AIR), strong echo rises at t/2 ahead of BW, back wall collapses (LOST), hatched shadow wedge UNEXAMINED below the delam.
